title: Teach a 5th-grade student a science concept.
problem:
Write a prompt asking ChatGPT to explain a scientific concept (e.g. photosynthesis) to a 10-
year-old.
hints: Specify the concept and audience (child). Use a friendly tone.
model_prompt:
Explain how photosynthesis works as if teaching a 10-year-old, using simple
analogies.

title: Summarize a news article.
problem:
Write a prompt to have ChatGPT summarize a given news article and highlight key points.
1.
2.
3.
4.
5.
6.
7.
8.
hints: Define the output (summary) and any length or focus (e.g. bullet points).
model_prompt:
Summarize the following news article in a few clear bullet points, highlighting the
main facts and conclusions.

title: Recipe instructions.
problem: Ask ChatGPT for step-by-step instructions to make a simple recipe (e.g. an omelette).
hints: Include the dish name and audience (e.g. beginner cook). Tone: instructional.
model_prompt:
Provide step-by-step cooking instructions for making a basic cheese omelette,
suitable for a beginner cook.

title: Plan a weekend trip.
problem: Write a prompt to plan a 2-day weekend trip itinerary in a given city.
hints: Name the city and include constraints (e.g. budget or interests).
model_prompt:
Suggest a detailed 2-day itinerary for a budget-friendly weekend trip in Denver, CO,
including sightseeing and dining suggestions.

title: Email to a professor.
problem: Create a prompt to draft a polite email requesting a deadline extension from a professor .
hints: State the purpose and required tone (formal, respectful). Mention any reason briefly.
model_prompt:
Write a polite, formal email to my professor asking for a one-week extension on my
assignment due next Monday.

title: Explain a math problem step-by-step.
problem: Ask ChatGPT to solve a math word problem and show each step of reasoning.
hints: Include the exact math problem statement. Specify “step-by-step explanation.”
model_prompt:
Solve this math problem step by step: If a car travels 60 miles in 2 hours at
constant speed, how long to travel 150 miles? Explain your reasoning.”

title: Grammar correction.
problem: Write a prompt to have ChatGPT correct grammatical errors in a given paragraph.
hints: Include the text to correct. Ask for explanations of corrections.
model_prompt:
Correct the grammar and spelling in the following paragraph and briefly explain each
correction.

title: Translate and simplify.
problem: Prompt ChatGPT to translate a sentence into another language and simplify its meaning.
hints: Specify source and target languages. Mention “simple words.”
model_prompt:
Translate this English sentence into Spanish and rephrase it using very simple words:
‘Climate change poses a severe threat to global ecosystems.’

title: Health advice for students.
problem: Ask ChatGPT for advice on healthy study habits for college students.
hints: Set context (college student). Ask for bullet points.
model_prompt: Give five healthy study habits for college students, explained in clear bullet points.

title: Career guidance.
problem: Write a prompt to get career advice on improving a resume for a job in data science.
hints: Mention the career field and existing document type (resume).
model_prompt:
How can I improve my resume for a data scientist position? Provide specific
suggestions on skills and formatting.

title: List top books.
problem: Prompt ChatGPT to list the top 5 books on personal finance with brief descriptions.
hints: Specify number of items and details wanted (title + one-sentence description).
model_prompt:
List the top 5 books on personal finance and give a one-sentence summary
of each.

title: Email subject line.
problem:
Create a prompt to craft a concise email subject line for a product launch
announcement.
hints: Specify context (product launch) and desired tone (excited, professional).
model_prompt:
Generate an engaging email subject line announcing a new eco-friendly
water bottle to our subscribers.

title: Fitness routine.
problem: Write a prompt to design a simple 20-minute daily exercise routine for beginners.
hints: Include constraints (20 minutes, beginner level).
model_prompt:
Create a 20-minute daily exercise routine for a fitness beginner , including
warm-up and cool-down steps.

title: Brainstorm blog topics.
problem: Ask ChatGPT to suggest 5 blog post ideas for a food and travel blog.
hints: Mention blog niche (food/travel) and format (list of ideas).
model_prompt:
Suggest 5 creative blog post ideas for a blog about food and travel, in list
form.

title: Productivity tips.
problem: Prompt ChatGPT to give 3 time-management tips for working professionals.
hints: State audience (working professionals). Ask for bullet points.
model_prompt:
Provide 3 effective time-management tips for busy working professionals in
bullet points.

title: Study quiz generation.
problem:
Write a prompt that asks ChatGPT to create 3 quiz questions (with answers) on basic
biology.
hints: Specify topic (biology) and number of questions.
model_prompt:
Generate 3 multiple-choice quiz questions (with answers) on basic high-
school biology.”
57.
58.
59.
60.
61.

title: Poem in a style.
problem: Create a prompt to write a short love poem in the style of Shakespeare.
hints: Mention style (Shakespearean) and subject (love).
model_prompt: Write a short love poem in the style of Shakespeare, using archaic language.

title: Research summary.
problem: Ask ChatGPT to summarize a given research abstract in layman’s terms.
hints: Provide abstract text. Instruct “layman’s terms.”
model_prompt:
Summarize this research abstract in simple layman’s language suitable for a
general audience.

title: Meeting agenda.
problem:
Write a prompt to generate a meeting agenda for a team discussion on marketing
strategy.
hints: Include meeting topic (marketing strategy) and format (list of agenda items).
model_prompt:
Create a concise meeting agenda for a team meeting about our new
marketing strategy.

title: List pros/cons.
problem: Prompt ChatGPT to list pros and cons of remote work for employees.
hints: State topic clearly and format (bullet pros and cons).
model_prompt: List 3 pros and 3 cons of remote work for employees in bullet points.

title: Email response.
problem: Create a prompt to generate a polite response to a colleague’s meeting request.
hints: Mention context (meeting request) and tone (friendly, professional).
model_prompt: Write a polite, friendly email accepting a meeting invitation from a colleague.

title: Language learning.
problem: Ask ChatGPT to create 5 flashcards for basic Spanish greetings.
hints:
Specify topic (Spanish greetings) and number of flashcards.
62.
63.
64.
65.
66.
67.
model_prompt:
Create 5 flashcards for basic Spanish greetings (each card with Spanish phrase
and English translation).

title: Book summary for a child.
problem: Prompt ChatGPT to summarize a children’s book for a 7-year-old.
hints: Provide book title. Ask for simple language.
model_prompt:
Summarize the children’s book Charlotte’s Web in simple language suitable for
a 7-year-old.

title: Topic explanation (casual).
problem: Write a prompt to have ChatGPT explain cryptocurrency in casual terms to a friend.
hints: State topic (cryptocurrency) and style (casual, friendly).
model_prompt:
Explain cryptocurrency to me casually, like you’re describing it to a friend
who knows nothing about it.

title: Joke writing.
problem: Create a prompt asking ChatGPT to tell a clean joke about computers.
hints: Specify subject (computers) and style (clean humor).
model_prompt: Tell me a clean, funny joke about computer programmers.

title: Business name brainstorming.
problem: Prompt ChatGPT to generate 5 creative business name ideas for a coffee shop.
hints: Include business type (coffee shop) and any theme or word to use.
model_prompt:
Suggest 5 creative, catchy names for a new urban coffee shop aimed at
young professionals.

title: Simple code explanation.
problem: Write a prompt to explain what a short Python code snippet does.
hints: Provide the code snippet. Ask for an explanation in plain terms.
model_prompt:
Explain in simple terms what this Python code does: for i in range(3):
print(i*i).

title: Marketing plan outline.
problem:
Create a prompt for an outline of a basic digital marketing strategy for a small
business.
hints:
Specify business type or product. Ask for organized points (e.g., market research,
channels, budget).
model_prompt:
Outline a basic digital marketing strategy for a small online retail store,
including target audience, channels, and budget considerations.

title: Event planning checklist.
problem: Prompt ChatGPT to create a checklist for planning a wedding.
hints: Specify event (wedding) and format (checklist or bullet list).
model_prompt:
Generate a detailed checklist of tasks for planning a wedding, from
engagement to reception.

title: Editing an essay draft.
problem:
Write a prompt asking ChatGPT to critique and improve an essay draft on climate
change.
hints: Provide essay text. Specify revision goals (clarity, grammar , flow).
model_prompt:
Review and improve this essay draft on climate change. Focus on clarity,
grammar , and argument strength.

title: Customer service response.
problem:
Prompt ChatGPT to draft a helpful customer service reply to a complaint about
shipping delays.
hints: Include the complaint details. Tone: apologetic and solution-focused.
model_prompt:
Write a polite customer service response apologizing for shipping delays and
offering a solution.

title: Travel itinerary with constraints.
problem: Ask ChatGPT to plan a 3-day trip itinerary to Paris under a $1000 budget.
hints: State destination (Paris), duration (3 days), and budget ($1000).
model_prompt:
Plan a 3-day trip itinerary to Paris with a budget of $1000, including
accommodations, meals, and activities.

title: Historical analysis.
problem: Create a prompt to analyze the causes and effects of the Industrial Revolution.
hints: Specify focus (causes and effects) and ask for structured answer (e.g., bullet points).
model_prompt:
Analyze the main causes and effects of the Industrial Revolution. Present your
answer in separate sections for causes and effects.

title: Email follow-up.
problem: Write a prompt to draft a follow-up email after a job interview.
hints: Mention position applied for , thank interviewer . Tone: professional.
model_prompt:
Compose a professional thank-you email following up on my job interview for
the marketing manager position.

title: Complex math tutoring.
problem: Prompt ChatGPT to tutor on solving quadratic equations step by step.
hints: Ask for step-by-step solution and explanation, assume learner is new to topic.
model_prompt:
Explain how to solve quadratic equations step by step, assuming I’m learning
this for the first time.

title: Programming learning resources.
problem:
Ask ChatGPT to list 4 high-quality online resources to learn Python, with brief
descriptions.
hints: Specify language (Python) and number of resources.
model_prompt:
List 4 reputable online resources for learning Python programming, with a 1-
sentence description each.

title: Story outline.
problem: Create a prompt to outline a short story about a time-travel adventure.
hints: Include genre (time travel) and ask for key plot points.
model_prompt:
Outline a short story about a time-travel adventure, listing the main plot
points.

title: Data insights.
problem: Prompt ChatGPT to explain trends in a dataset of monthly sales (data provided).
hints: Describe dataset columns briefly. Ask for summary of trends and possible reasons.
model_prompt:
Given monthly sales data (e.g., columns: Month, Sales), describe any trends
and suggest possible explanations.

title: Business proposal drafting.
problem:
Write a prompt to draft an outline of a business proposal for a new app
development.
hints: State app idea and key proposal sections (objective, market analysis, budget).
model_prompt:
Outline a business proposal for developing a new task-management app,
including sections for objectives, target market, and budget.

title: Advanced grammar explanation.
problem:
Ask ChatGPT to explain the difference between two grammatical terms (e.g., “affect”
vs “effect”).
hints: Provide both terms. Ask for examples.
model_prompt:
Explain the difference between ‘affect’ and ‘effect’ with clear examples of
usage.

title: Lesson plan creation.
problem:
Prompt ChatGPT to create a detailed high-school lesson plan on photosynthesis,
including objectives, activities, and assessment questions.
hints:
Specify education level and components (objectives, materials, steps). Tone: formal
educator .
model_prompt:
Develop a detailed lesson plan on photosynthesis for a 9th grade biology
class. Include learning objectives, required materials, instructional steps, and a few
assessment questions.

title: Comprehensive marketing strategy.
problem:
Write a prompt to generate a full marketing strategy for an eco-friendly fashion
startup (with sections like market research, channels, content plan).
hints:
Include startup context, request distinct strategy sections.
13.
14.
15.
1.
2.
model_prompt:
Create a comprehensive marketing strategy for an eco-friendly fashion
startup. Cover market research, target audience, marketing channels (social media, email,
etc.), content themes, and budget considerations.

title: Scientific research summary.
problem:
Prompt ChatGPT to read a provided abstract and critique its methodology and
conclusions.
hints: Include abstract. Ask for structured critique (strengths, weaknesses).
model_prompt:
Critique the following research abstract: identify its methodology’s strengths
and weaknesses, and comment on the validity of its conclusions.

title: Software design document.
problem:
Write a prompt to outline a software design for a simple mobile app (login, data
storage, UI).
hints: Specify app features (e.g., login, user profiles). Ask for system components.
model_prompt:
Outline the software design for a mobile app that includes user login, data
storage, and a simple user interface. Cover components like backend, database, and UI flow.

title: Business plan draft.
problem:
Prompt ChatGPT to draft an executive summary for a business plan of a new fitness
center .
hints: Include key info (concept, market, finances). Tone: professional.
model_prompt:
Write an executive summary for a business plan of a new boutique fitness
center, describing the concept, target market, and basic financial projections.

title: Complex data analysis.
problem:
Ask ChatGPT to analyze a dataset (e.g. sales vs advertising spend) and recommend
actions.
hints: Describe dataset context. Ask for insights and suggestions.
model_prompt:
Given the dataset with columns Sales and Advertising Spend over 12 months,
analyze the relationship and recommend actionable marketing strategies.

title: Legal document generation.
problem:
Prompt ChatGPT to draft a simple freelance contract for a graphic designer .
3.
4.
5.
6.
7.
hints: Include parties (client/designer), scope of work, payment terms.
model_prompt:
Draft a simple freelance contract between a client and a graphic designer ,
including scope of work, payment terms, and confidentiality clause.

title: Literature analysis.
problem: Ask ChatGPT to compare themes in two literary works (given titles).
hints: Provide titles/authors. Request a side-by-side analysis.
model_prompt:
Compare the main themes in ‘1984’ by George Orwell and ‘Brave New
World’ by Aldous Huxley, highlighting similarities and differences.

title: Scientific proposal outline.
problem:
Write a prompt to outline a grant proposal for researching renewable energy
solutions.
hints: Include research goal, methodology, expected impact.
model_prompt:
Outline a grant proposal for a research project on innovative renewable
energy solutions. Include objectives, methodology, and potential impact.

title: Policy recommendation memo.
problem:
Prompt ChatGPT to draft a policy memo recommending solutions to reduce urban
traffic congestion.
hints: Define audience (city council). Format: problem, recommendations, benefits.
model_prompt:
Write a concise policy memo for a city council on reducing urban traffic
congestion, including problem overview and recommended solutions with benefits.

title: Advanced algorithm explanation.
problem:
Ask ChatGPT to explain how a complex algorithm (e.g. Dijkstra’s shortest path)
works, step by step.
hints: Specify algorithm and ask for step-by-step. Assume reader knows basic concepts.
model_prompt:
Explain in clear steps how Dijkstra’s shortest path algorithm works on a
weighted graph.

title: Creative ad copy.
problem:
Create a prompt to write a compelling Facebook ad for an eco-friendly cleaning
product.
8.
9.
10.
11.
12.
hints: Include product details. Tone: catchy and persuasive.
model_prompt:
Write a catchy Facebook ad for EcoClean, a natural cleaning spray, targeting
environmentally conscious consumers.

title: Comprehensive report generation.
problem:
Prompt ChatGPT to compile a report on a given topic (e.g. climate change) including
definition, impacts, and mitigation strategies.
hints: Specify sections needed. Request a formal report format.
model_prompt:
Generate a structured report on climate change covering: definition, current
impacts, and possible mitigation strategies.

title: Data transformation challenge.
problem:
Ask ChatGPT to convert a narrative into a formatted table given categories (the
narrative provided).
hints: Supply narrative text and table fields.
model_prompt:
Convert the following project description into a table with columns: Task,
Deadline, Responsible Person. The description is: …

title: Philosophical debate prompt.
problem:
Write a prompt to debate two philosophical viewpoints on free will, providing
arguments for both sides.
hints: Specify the viewpoints. Ask for balanced arguments.
model_prompt:
Discuss the philosophical debate between determinism and free will. Present
arguments for both perspectives objectively.
